narrative: Hopes for a US-Iran ceasefire drive a dollar retreat as Fed's Goolsbee warns the conflict remains a persistent inflationary shock. USD/JPY holds at 156.25 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite cooling geopolitical risk premiums; gold higher +0.34% near $4,710; equities +1.46%; DXY -0.05%; VIX 17.4. BoC's Macklem flags potential consecutive hikes on energy costs, supporting CAD against the broader G8 trend. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27 for NZD directional cues.
